title: AI Agent Development
metaTitle: AI Agent Developer for Hire — Agentic AI Systems | Avaab Razzaq
metaDescription: Build autonomous multi-agent AI systems using LangGraph, CrewAI, and MCP. I design AI agents that take real-world actions and complete complex tasks end-to-end.
heroSubtitle: I build autonomous, multi-agent AI systems that perceive, plan, use tools, and complete complex tasks without constant human input.
introduction: I design and build agentic AI systems — from single autonomous agents to multi-agent orchestration pipelines. Using LangGraph, CrewAI, and Model Context Protocol, I deliver AI that acts, not just answers.

benefits.title: True Autonomy
benefits.description: Agents that plan, use tools, delegate, and complete goals end-to-end — not just answer prompts.

benefits.title: Real-World Tool Access
benefits.description: Via MCP and direct integrations, agents act on your business systems: CRM, databases, email, APIs.

benefits.title: Safe by Design
benefits.description: Human-in-the-loop checkpoints, confidence thresholds, and full audit logs built in from day one.

services.name: Single Agent Systems
services.description: Autonomous agents with tool access, memory, and goal-directed behavior for specific business tasks.

services.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
services.description: CrewAI and LangGraph pipelines with specialized agent roles that collaborate and delegate sub-tasks.

services.name: MCP Tool Integration
services.description: Connect agents to your business systems via Model Context Protocol servers for standardized tool access.

services.name: Agent Evaluation & Safety
services.description: Evaluation frameworks, safety guardrails, and monitoring systems that make agents production-ready.

cta.title: Ready to Build an AI Agent?
cta.description: Book a free discovery call to scope your agentic AI use case.

faqs.question: What's the difference between AI automation and an AI agent?
faqs.answer: AI automation executes predefined workflows. An AI agent perceives context, decides which steps to take, uses tools dynamically, and adapts when things change. Agents handle complexity that automation can't.

faqs.question: What frameworks do you use?
faqs.answer: LangGraph for stateful workflows with complex branching. CrewAI for multi-agent role-based systems. MCP for standardized tool access. I choose based on your use case.
